sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 18

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 18:1
items.html: (to the question) Through the Neshamot, Ruchot, and Nefashot of the lower ones, who are the dwellers of BYA [Beria, Yetzira, Assiya]. For it is impossible to clarify any clarification unless one is at a degree that relates to those clarifications. And just as nothing can be clarified from above one's degree, so nothing can be clarified from what is below one's degree. (p. 734, Item 4)
